must_detect.matched_text: Incident Report — Cybersecurity (APPI/My Number and FIEA context) — Shinmon Electronics K.K.

On 2025-04-07 09:42 JST, unauthorized access to the “KirinBoard” portal was detected, potentially exposing draft documents concerning a confidential TOB (take-over bid) proposal to acquire Seikatsu Grid K.K., a matter not disclosed to the market.

This is not a material adverse change (MAC) statement and does not amend earnings guidance; public references: APPI implementation guidelines and our ISMS manual section 4.2 (circulated on the intranet).

This is not a material adverse change (MAC) statement and does not amend earnings guidance; public references: APPI implementation guidelines and our ISMS manual section 4.2 (circulated on the intranet).
